title: Availability Check
description: Commerce v1 availability check contract for resolving whether an SKU can enter quote/cart/order flows.
$comment: Sources: TECH-04 Commerce Runtime sellable gate, TECH-03 sellable status, PACK-04 runtime chain. TODO: source documents do not lock a complete availability taxonomy beyond sellable, stock, recall hold, sale lock, and trace readiness.

channel_context_id.description: Optional channel context that requested the check.

stock_available.description: Whether stock is available for sale according to the runtime source.

trace_ready.description: Whether trace/public trace readiness permits sale.
